summary: Frontend testing completed for Accounting Settings page and Print voucher functionality. All 8 features passed verification: Settings page loads at /accounting/settings with Fiscal Year config, Period Lock toggle, Default Accounts dropdowns, and Save button working. Print buttons visible in Expenses and Income pages. Settings navigation link present under Accounting menu.
passed_tests: Accounting Settings page loads correctly at /accounting/settings
Fiscal Year Configuration: Start (dropdown with January 1, April 1, etc.), End (auto-calculated), Current Year (dropdown 2024-2028)
Period Lock section visible with Enable Period Lock toggle
Period Lock toggle works - changes state from unchecked to checked
Lock Date input appears when Period Lock is enabled with warning message
Default Accounts section: Cash, Bank, Receivable, Payable, Sales, COGS, Inventory dropdowns all visible
Default Account dropdowns are functional - showing account options
Save Settings button visible and clickable - shows success message
Expenses page: Actions column with print button (Printer icon) visible for each expense row
Income page: Actions column with print button (Printer icon) visible for each income row
Navigation sidebar: Settings link exists under Accounting menu
Settings navigation link correctly navigates to /accounting/settings
seed_data_creation: Used existing expense and income data from previous tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Accounting Settings page fully functional. Settings at /accounting/settings with fiscal year configuration (start dropdown, auto-calculated end, current year selector), period lock toggle (shows date input when enabled with warning message), default accounts dropdowns (7 account types), and save functionality. Print voucher buttons added to Expenses and Income pages in Actions column. All features working correctly.

fiscal_year_configuration.details: Fiscal Year Start dropdown (Jan, Apr, Jul, Oct), Fiscal Year End (auto-calculated, disabled input), Current Fiscal Year dropdown (2024-2028)

period_lock.details: Toggle works - state changes from unchecked to checked, Lock Date input appears when enabled, warning message displays

default_accounts_dropdowns.details: 7 default account dropdowns visible: Cash, Bank, Receivable, Payable, Sales, COGS, Inventory - all with account options

save_settings_button.details: Save Settings button visible and functional - shows success message on save

expenses_print_button.details: Actions column visible in Expenses table with Printer icon button for each row

income_print_button.details: Actions column visible in Income table with Printer icon button for each row

navigation_settings_link.details: Settings link exists under Accounting menu in sidebar, navigates correctly to /accounting/settings
